title: NullPointerException in UserSessionManager causing silent auth failures
description: After deploying v2.3.1, a subset of users (approx 8-12%) are failing to authenticate silently. The login appears to succeed (200 OK returned) but the user session is never properly initialised. Subsequent API calls return 401 Unauthorized. Users are not shown any error message, they just end up in a broken authenticated state.
expected_behavior: After successful login, user session should be fully initialised. All subsequent API calls within the session should succeed with the user's auth token.
actual_behavior: Login returns 200 OK but session.user_id is None for ~10% of requests. Subsequent API calls return 401. No error is shown to the user. The issue appears non-deterministic but correlates with concurrent login requests.
reproduction_hints: Occurs more frequently under concurrent load (10+ simultaneous logins)
Seems related to the new async session creation introduced in v2.3.1
Rate: ~10% failure under load, ~0% in sequential testing
impact: Users silently stuck in broken auth state, forced to retry login
